postData.contentHtml:
The 2026 Memorial Tournament is heating up as players navigate the demanding Muirfield Village Golf Club in its third round. After a spectacular performance in the second round, J.T. Poston has seized the lead, demonstrating exceptional skill amidst treacherous conditions.

Poston’s remarkable seven-under 65 on Friday, a round that included eight birdies and only one bogey, propelled him into sole possession of the top spot. Close behind, Ryan Gerard is poised just one shot back at eight under, setting the stage for an exciting weekend.

However, Muirfield Village has proven to be a formidable opponent for many of the sport's biggest names. Rory McIlroy (74) and Scottie Scheffler (72) find themselves further down the leaderboard, tied at one over heading into Saturday's play. Notably, fan-favorite Jordan Spieth faced an early exit after a challenging Friday 79 saw him miss the cut entirely.

The tournament hasn't been without its share of drama beyond the scores. Challenging course conditions have been a consistent theme, with many players' scores soaring. Adding to the complexity, the third round experienced a weather delay, temporarily suspending play at Muirfield Village, further emphasizing the tough test posed by Jack Nicklaus's design.

Golf enthusiasts can catch all the action of the third round on TV via CBS and Golf Channel. Golf Channel initiated coverage at 12:30 p.m. ET, with CBS taking over from 2:30 p.m. ET. For those who prefer streaming, PGA Tour Live on ESPN+ offers exclusive early coverage starting at 9 a.m. ET, alongside featured group and hole coverage throughout the day.

Beyond the prestige, players are vying for a substantial $4 million prize from a $20 million purse, along with 700 FedEx Cup points. As the tournament progresses, social media sentiment remains largely positive, with fans eagerly debating and discussing the unfolding competition.

With difficult conditions, unexpected leaders, and top contenders battling to climb back, the 2026 Memorial Tournament promises an enthralling conclusion.
postData.title: Poston Soars Amidst Muirfield's Challenge: A Look at Round 3 of the 2026 Memorial Tournament
postData.summary: J.T. Poston leads a competitive field into the third round of the 2026 Memorial Tournament, where challenging conditions at Muirfield Village have tested even the PGA Tour's best. Find out how to watch and what to expect as the drama unfolds.
